summary.text: The task is: Search X for posts between 2026-07-13 and 2026-07-16 from these accounts: @miroshark_, @aeonframework. Focus on launches, announcements, org migrations, new features. For each: @handle, f...

content.text:
**@miroshark_**  
**Full text:** Run the future before it happens.  
LLMs predict the next word, not the next week.  
MiroShark casts everyone with a stake in your scenario as an agent - each with their own incentives.  
They post, argue, bet, flip. Ten minutes later, you get a report on how it played out.  
**Date:** 2026-07-13  
**Engagement:** Likes=11, Reposts=3, Replies=4  
**Link:** https://x.com/miroshark_/status/2076679218499403965

**@miroshark_**  
**Full text:** MiroShark is now listed on the @base App 🦈  
Drop in anything - a trade idea, a news headline or a question you can't answer - and MiroShark simulate the outcome with dozens of agents 👇  
**Date:** 2026-07-13  
**Engagement:** Likes=22, Reposts=2, Replies=3  
**Link:** https://x.com/miroshark_/status/2076665633756864732

**@aeonframework**  
**Full text:** Grok 4.5 by @xai is now live on aeon ⭐  
Use your @grok subscription & get started now 👇  
**Date:** 2026-07-15  
**Engagement:** Likes=21, Reposts=3, Replies=5  
**Link:** https://x.com/aeonframework/status/2077461797045473417

**@aeonframework**  
**Full text:** We recently finished our first batch of introductory articles about our autonomous agentic framework  
If you are curious about agents and on how they can rely the least on your approval, we strongly suggest you to start reading these articles.  
We'll be back with new ones 🔜  
**Date:** 2026-07-15  
**Engagement:** Likes=31, Reposts=3, Replies=2  
**Link:** https://x.com/aeonframework/status/2077312271630434560

**@aeonframework**  
**Full text:** The aeon organization is now live on Github ⭐  
The IP of OpenDia, soul.md & minitor now also belongs to base:0xbf8e8f0e8866a7052f948c16508644347c57aba3  
- OpenDia is a leading open-source extension that connects your browser to your agent, forked by the creator of Claude Code.  
- Soul.md is the best way to build a personality for your agent, adopted by @ribbonfarm & more.  
- Minitor is a WIP dashboard to monitor the internet.  
Each of those projects interconnects with aeon & fit into our mission of building the most autonomous agent framework ⭐  
**Date:** 2026-07-14  
**Engagement:** Likes=38, Reposts=7, Replies=4  
**Link:** https://x.com/aeonframework/status/2077028299369304148
